description: Ground-truth question set for HAIP RAG evaluation. Each question has a clear answer in a specific NICE guideline present in the knowledge base. 'relevant_doc_ids' lists the doc_id(s) that SHOULD be retrieved; retrieval is scored by whether the system surfaces one of them in its results. Questions are hand-written from real corpus titles - true ground truth, not synthetic.
